value.found_quote: `mcp` | `mcp(server/tool)`, `mcp(server/*)`, or `mcp(*)` | Matches exact MCP tools or all tools on a specified server (applies equally to local `mcpl` servers and remote connections).
value.rationale: The page explicitly documents the `mcp(server/*)` permission target which matches all tools on a specified server, matching the claim. It is presented as a supported action with no indication of deprecation.
